ddls:
CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the manufacturer */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the manufacturer's headquarters */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the manufacturer was founded */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the manufacturer's logo */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website URL of the manufacturer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "car_models" (
  "car_model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each car model */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manufacturer of the car model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the car model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the car model */,
  "vehicle_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of the vehicle */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Category of the car model based on features and price */,
  "production_start_year" INTEGER /* Year the car model started production */,
  "production_end_year" INTEGER /* Year the car model ended production */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the car model */,
  "safety_rating" TEXT /* Safety rating of the car model */,
  "fuel_efficiency" TEXT /* Fuel efficiency of the car model */,
  "emissions_rating" TEXT /* Emissions rating of the car model */,
  "seating_capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the car model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("car_model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_car_models_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_car_models_vehicle_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_type_id") REFERENCES vehicle_types ("vehicle_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_car_models_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_data" (
  "sales_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales data entry */,
  "car_model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the car model */,
  "sales_in_thousands" REAL /* Sales of the car model in thousands */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the sales data */,
  "resale_value" REAL /* Resale value of the car model */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the sales data is collected */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the sales data is collected */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the sales data is collected */,
  "sales_channel" TEXT /* Channel through which the sales were made */,
  "discount_percentage" REAL /* Discount percentage applied to the sales */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the sales were made */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Exchange rate used for currency conversion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sales_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_car_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("car_model_id") REFERENCES car_models ("car_model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_types" (
  "vehicle_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle type */,
  "vehicle_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the vehicle type */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Detailed description of the vehicle type */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image representing the vehicle type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "car_features" (
  "car_feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each car feature */,
  "car_model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the car model */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the car feature */,
  "feature_value" TEXT /* Value of the car feature */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the feature value */,
  "feature_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the car feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("car_feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_car_features_car_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("car_model_id") REFERENCES car_models ("car_model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_data" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price data entry */,
  "car_model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the car model */,
  "price_in_thousands" REAL /* Price of the car model in thousands */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the price data */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the price data is collected */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the price data is collected */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the price data is collected */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the price is listed */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Exchange rate used for currency conversion */,
  "discount_percentage" REAL /* Discount percentage applied to the price */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_data_car_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("car_model_id") REFERENCES car_models ("car_model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Detailed description of the category */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image representing the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, viewer) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department in which the user works */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout, data access) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID of the user's session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market trend */,
  "trend_name" TEXT /* Name of the market trend */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the market trend */,
  "data" TEXT /* Data related to the market trend */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the market trend is observed */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the market trend is observed */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the market trend is observed */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the market trend data */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the data was last updated */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of the market trend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer preference */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "preference_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer preference */,
  "preference_value" TEXT /* Value of the customer preference */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the customer preference data is collected */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the customer preference data is collected */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the customer preference data is collected */,
  "preference_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the customer preference */,
  "preference_source" TEXT /* Source of the customer preference data */,
  "preference_date" TEXT /* Date when the preference was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_preferences_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
